title: OpenConsole.exe
html:
OpenConsole.exe

Console Window host for Windows Terminal

Execute

Use OpenConsole.exe as a proxy binary to evade defensive counter-measures

OpenConsole.exe {PATH:.exe}

Execute specified process with OpenConsole.exe as parent process — MITRE: T1202 — Privileges: User
